neqsim.mcp.model.ApiEnvelope

Packages that use ApiEnvelope
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.model
Typed model classes for NeqSim MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration.
neqsim.mcp.runners
 

  • Uses of ApiEnvelope in neqsim.mcp.model

    Methods in neqsim.mcp.model that return ApiEnvelope
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> ApiEnvelope<T>
    ApiEnvelope.error(String code, String message, String remediation)
    Creates an error envelope with a single issue.
    static <T> ApiEnvelope<T>
    ApiEnvelope.errors(List<DiagnosticIssue> issues)
    Creates an error envelope with multiple issues.
    static <T> ApiEnvelope<T>
    ApiEnvelope.success(T data)
    Creates a success envelope with the given data.
    static <T> ApiEnvelope<T>
    ApiEnvelope.success(T data, List<String> warnings)
    Creates a success envelope with data and warnings.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ApiEnvelope<FlashResult>
    FlashRunner.runTyped(FlashRequest request)
    Runs a flash calculation from a typed request object.
    static ApiEnvelope<ProcessResult>
    ProcessRunner.runTyped(String json)
    Runs a process simulation and returns a typed result.
